PokerStars Hand #220001000004: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02 USD) - 2024/01/07 15:33:00 ET
Table 'Altair II' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: BTNPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 2: SBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 3: BBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 4: UTGPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 5: Hero ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 6: COPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
SBPlayer: posts small blind $0.01
BBPlayer: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Ad]
UTGPlayer: folds
Hero: raises $0.06 to $0.08
COPlayer: folds
BTNPlayer: folds
SBPlayer: folds
BBPlayer: raises $1.98 to $2.00 and is all-in
Hero: calls $1.92 and is all-in
*** FLOP *** [2c 7d Ts]
*** TURN *** [2c 7d Ts] [3h]
*** RIVER *** [2c 7d Ts 3h] [9c]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
BBPlayer: shows [Kh Kd] (a pair of Kings)
Hero: shows [Ah Ad] (a pair of Aces)
Hero collected $4.00 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $4.01 | Rake $0.01
Board [2c 7d Ts 3h 9c]
Seat 1: BTNPlayer (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: SBPlayer (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: BBPlayer (big blind) showed [Kh Kd] and lost with a pair of Kings
Seat 4: UTGPlayer folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 5: Hero showed [Ah Ad] and won ($4.00) with a pair of Aces
Seat 6: COPlayer folded before Flop (didn't bet)
